'''yasutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iambographer|iambographer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iambographer|iambographer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yasutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæsitith|yæsitith]] || [[word:yæsitij|yæsitij]] || [[word:yæsitish|yæsitish]] || [[word:yæsiti|yæsiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasusututh|yasusututh]] || [[word:yasusutuj|yasusutuj]] || [[word:yasusutush|yasusutush]] || [[word:yasusutu|yasusutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasututh|yasututh]] || [[word:yasutuj|yasutuj]] || [[word:yasutush|yasutush]] || [[word:yasutu|yasutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasuftuth|yasuftuth]] || [[word:yasuftuj|yasuftuj]] || [[word:yasuftush|yasuftush]] || [[word:yasuftuf|yasuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yasututhu|yasututhu]] || [[word:yasutuju|yasutuju]] || [[word:yasutushu|yasutushu]] || [[word:yasutuku|yasutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yasututh|yasututh]] || [[word:yasutuj|yasutuj]] || [[word:yasutush|yasutush]] || [[word:yasutu|yasutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yasututhul|yasututhul]] || [[word:yasutujul|yasutujul]] || [[word:yasutushul|yasutushul]] || [[word:yasutukul|yasutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yasututhuthu|yasututhuthu]] || [[word:yasutujuju|yasutujuju]] || [[word:yasutushushu|yasutushushu]] || [[word:yasutuku|yasutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yasututhun|yasututhun]] || [[word:yasutujun|yasutujun]] || [[word:yasutushun|yasutushun]] || [[word:yasutukun|yasutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yasututhuoro|yasututhuoro]] || [[word:yasutujuoro|yasutujuoro]] || [[word:yasutushuoro|yasutushuoro]] || [[word:yasutukuoro|yasutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
